Description: Add OTX_API_KEY / GITHUB_TOKEN / PRISM7_INBOUND_EMAIL to .env.example. All optional — features degrade gracefully when absent.
Add enforcement_enabled (default:false) and ueba_grace_period_days (default:14) to config/settings.json schema.
New job. Reads providers.yaml + unauthorized.csv. Calls boto3 route53resolver to create/update DNS Firewall domain list. Idempotent. Runs hourly at HH+10.
Extend dns_firewall_sync.py to read authorize.py allow lists and write Route53 ALLOW override rules per user.
Register dns_firewall_sync.py in main.py scheduler after hourly rollup.
New module. unblock_domain(domain) calls Route53 Resolver API to remove BLOCK and add ALLOW immediately — no wait for hourly sync.
Add Unblock Now button to manager_tab_risks.py. Calls unblock_domain() via backend. Admin role only.
Add enforcement_enabled toggle in settings_form.py. Default OFF.
New script. Runs each hook cycle. Fetches s3://patronai/config/enforcement_blocklist.json. Writes to /etc/hosts. Entries tagged # patronai-managed.
Remove # patronai-managed entries from /etc/hosts when user authorizes a domain.
Unauthorized domain → Route53 BLOCK verified → hosts entry verified → authorize → unblock_domain() → both layers cleared.
New: aiohttp CONNECT proxy. Port 8080. Intercepts tunnels for domains in providers.yaml. Pass-through everything else.
4 regex patterns reused from code_engine.py: PAN / SSN / AKIA / bulk email ≥10. Returns (hit bool pattern str).
On hit: return 403. Write to s3://patronai/findings/dlp/YYYY/MM/DD/{uuid}.jsonl. Store pattern hit + payload hash only (never raw PII).
source_hint=dlp_proxy normalizer in ingestor/pipeline.py. Reads findings/dlp/ via CursorStore. Adds dlp_pattern field to FLAT_SCHEMA.
Add dlp-proxy service to docker-compose.yml. python:3.13-slim. Expose 8080.
Document CA cert install steps and HTTP_PROXY config in developer onboarding guide.
Synthetic PAN in body → proxy blocks → finding in PatronAI → DLP badge in dashboard.
Add 15-line wrapper to existing src/notify/email.py. Subject: [PatronAI:{sev}] {outcome} | {owner} → {provider}. Body: JSON finding. To: PRISM7_INBOUND_EMAIL from .env.
Note: ✅ SES infrastructure already done — just a wrapper

Description: 5-line addition to alerter/dispatcher.py. results["prism7"] = _fire_prism7(finding). Guard: only if PRISM7_INBOUND_EMAIL set.
New nightly job skeleton. Register in main.py at 02:00 UTC.
GET /api/v1/indicators/domain/{domain}/reputation for net-new unknown domains. 7-day per-domain cache. OTX_API_KEY from .env.
Search GitHub API for mcpServers in JSON. Extract domains. GITHUB_TOKEN from .env.
Nightly download of ATLAS.yaml from public GitHub. Write config/atlas_map.yaml mapping PatronAI outcomes to ATLAS technique IDs.
Domain auto-added only if ≥2 sources confirm. Single-source → pending_intel.yaml for human review.
Commit new entries on chore/intel-refresh-{date} branch with [INTEL:AUTO] tag. Weekly operator review.
EventBridge → SNS → source_hint=guardduty normalizer path. CRITICAL for IAMUser findings.
Document s3://patronai/findings_current/ schema and path for customer SIEM connectors (Splunk S3 input). Zero code change.
Note: v1 bridge — customer configures their own SIEM

Description: Add opensearch:2.x single-node + opensearch-dashboards to docker-compose.yml. Evaluate RAM headroom first.
Write findings to index patronai-findings-{YYYY.MM.DD} after each compact cycle. 90-day ILM retention.
New ingestor. Reads s3://patronai/anomalies/ via CursorStore. Same pattern as all other ingestors. source=log_analyzer. Skip malformed JSON.
If source==log_analyzer → severity=HIGH. Add AI Anomaly badge in manager_tab_risks.py.
During first ueba_grace_period_days (default 14): log anomalies but don't fire dispatcher. Baseline Building badge in dashboard.
Document IAM policy: Log Analyzer read-only on findings_current/ + write-only on anomalies/. In operator guide.
Config file: NIST AI RMF / GDPR Art.22 / SOC2 CC6.1 unconditional. EU AI Act conditional with risk-tier caveat. framework_version + last_reviewed fields.
Tags each finding with matching control IDs from compliance_map.yaml.
Update r6_compliance.py — Controls Coverage table: covered vs uncovered controls.
If compliance_map.yaml last_reviewed > 90 days: warning banner in dashboard + settings_form.
Note: Drama — stale map is audit liability

Description: Document all 7 gaps: Route53 setup / DLP proxy routing / Prism7 email wire / threat intel / Log Analyzer IAM / compliance map.
Pre-flight checklist before enabling enforcement. Rollback steps. DNS Firewall teardown.
tests/integration/ covering: enforcement sync / DLP block / Prism7 dispatch / OTX enrich / Log Analyzer ingest / compliance tag.
